THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEHRANI, FEREDOUN RAVAZ, SOLMAZ TEHRANI, IRAJ TAJ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 CHUMASERO DRIVE, #4G, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGES JOINTLY & SEVERALLY AGAINST I/T/TEHRANI, S/RAVAZ & F/TEHRANI FOR $1500.00; DAMAGES JOINTLY & SEVERALLY AGAINST S/RAVAZ & F/TEHRANI FOR $1102.38; DAMAGES AGAINST F/TEHRANI ONLY FOR $150.00.
